title: BasinGraph: geometry-controlled basin-graph optimization
description: Documentation-only cleanup for the selected BasinGraph 2.0.0-rc1 implementation. Obsolete legacy-validation statements were removed; algorithm source, frozen options and reported results are unchanged.
